features: Depend comfort protect pants for women keep you feeling secure and confident both day and night with a soft, comfortable, discreet fit
Depend total protect system has been specifically tailored with the combination of fast-absorption channels and odour-eliminating filters
Depend incontinence pants for women provide worry-free protection from leaks and odours
Specially made to fit the shape of a woman with a pant-like waistband, oval-cut leg openings and fit-flex protection with lycra strands to ensure a smooth fit
Magnificiant absorbency, disposable pants have an overnight guarantee and come in a neutral beige colour
description: Product Description Reclaim and reconnect with what matters most in your life. Depend comfort protect incontinence pants for women give you more freedom to forget about leaks. Depend disposable pants feature the total protect system that has been specifically tailored with the combination of fast-absorption channels and odour-eliminating filters. Trust in depend pants for worry-free protection from leaks and odours. Drawing wetness away from the skin, the comfortable, discreet pants have snug, pant-like leg openings with all-around elastics for a close-to-body fit - just step in and pull on. And with the improved waistband for added security, depend comfort protect for women provide a pant-like fit. Depend incontinence pants are soft, quiet, breathable and discreet. Depend incontinence pants for women are latex-free, lotion-free, fragrance-free and come in a neutral beige colour. Size small/medium fits dress sizes 8-14; size large fits dress sizes 14-22; size extra-large fits dress sizes 22-26 vs previous depend pants products. Directions [1. Remove protective packaging. 2. Choose the appropriate size according to your needs. 3. Wear as underwear. 4. Dispose of the product appropriately after use, according to local waste management guidelines.] Safety Warning Apply the protector following the arrows, change every 4 to 6 hours or as needed, throw the used protector into a trash can with lid and do not flush it in the toilet. It is important to choose the right size and absorbance according to individual needs. Box Contains 27 Pants in total See more
